benchmark_details.name: SafetyBench
benchmark_details.overview: SafetyBench is a comprehensive benchmark for evaluating the safety of Large Language Models (LLMs), comprising 11,435 diverse multiple choice questions spanning across 7 distinct categories of safety concerns.

purpose_and_intended_users.goal: To evaluate the safety abilities of Large Language Models (LLMs).
purpose_and_intended_users.limitations: Some safety concerns, such as political issues, may be overlooked.

data.source: Collected from various datasets, safety-related exams, and augmented using LLMs.
data.annotation: Validated through human verification and automatic checks.

methodology.calculation: Metrics calculated based on the proportion of correct answers to the total questions.
methodology.interpretation: Higher accuracy indicates better safety understanding by the LLM.
methodology.baseline_results: GPT-4 shows significant performance advantages over other LLMs.
methodology.validation: Extensive testing over 25 popular LLMs in zero-shot and few-shot settings.

ethical_and_legal_considerations.consent_procedures: Crowd workers were informed in advance how the annotated data will be used.
